<Note> This page is not reviewed or endorsed by the Livepeer team. It is a community effort to help GPU providers find pools to join. Please do your due diligence before joining any pool. See [Join a Pool](/v2/orchestrators/guides/join-a-pool) for more information. </Note>

一个页面，供池操作员概述他们的池，如何加入，奖励是什么等。

<Note> Uses an automation to pull in data from a google sheet. </Note>

  >
